14 #include "ArcaneFemFunctionsGpu.h"
15 #include "FemUtilsGlobal.h"

20 namespace Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu
21 {
22 
23 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
24 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
25 
26 void BoundaryConditionsHelpers::
27 applyDirichletToNodeGroupRhsOnly(const Int32 dof_index, Real value, RunQueue* queue, IMesh* mesh,
28  DoFLinearSystem& linear_system,
29  const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes, const NodeGroup& node_group)
30 {
31  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(queue);
32  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(mesh);
33 
34  NodeInfoListView nodes_infos(mesh->nodeFamily());
35  auto node_dof(dofs_on_nodes.nodeDoFConnectivityView());
36 
37  auto command = Accelerator::makeCommand(queue);
38  auto in_out_forced_info = Accelerator::viewInOut(command, linear_system.getForcedInfo());
39  auto in_out_rhs_variable = Accelerator::viewInOut(command, linear_system.rhsVariable());
40 
41  command << RUNCOMMAND_ENUMERATE(NodeLocalId, node_lid, node_group)
42  {
43  if (nodes_infos.isOwn(node_lid)) {
44  DoFLocalId dof_id = node_dof.dofId(node_lid, dof_index);
45  in_out_forced_info[dof_id] = true;
46  in_out_rhs_variable[dof_id] = value;
47  }
48  };
49 }
50 
51 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
52 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
53 
54 void BoundaryConditionsHelpers::
55 applyDirichletToNodeGroupViaPenalty(const Int32 dof_index, Real value, Real penalty, RunQueue* queue, IMesh* mesh,
56  DoFLinearSystem& linear_system, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes, const NodeGroup& node_group)
57 {
58  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(queue);
59  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(mesh);
60 
61  NodeInfoListView nodes_infos(mesh->nodeFamily());
62  auto node_dof(dofs_on_nodes.nodeDoFConnectivityView());
63 
64  auto command = Accelerator::makeCommand(queue);
65  auto in_out_forced_info = Accelerator::viewInOut(command, linear_system.getForcedInfo());
66  auto in_out_forced_value = Accelerator::viewInOut(command, linear_system.getForcedValue());
67  auto in_out_rhs_variable = Accelerator::viewInOut(command, linear_system.rhsVariable());
68 
69  command << RUNCOMMAND_ENUMERATE(NodeLocalId, node_lid, node_group)
70  {
71  if (nodes_infos.isOwn(node_lid)) {
72  DoFLocalId dof_id = node_dof.dofId(node_lid, dof_index);
73  in_out_forced_info[dof_id] = true;
74  in_out_forced_value[dof_id] = penalty;
75  in_out_rhs_variable[dof_id] = penalty * value;
76  }
77  };
78 }
79 
80 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
81 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
82 
83 void BoundaryConditionsHelpers::
84 applyDirichletToNodeGroupViaRowOrRowColumnElimination(Byte elimination_type, const Int32 dof_index, Real value, RunQueue* queue,
85  DoFLinearSystem& linear_system, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
86  const NodeGroup& node_group)
87 {
88  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(queue);
89 
90  DoFLinearSystemRowEliminationHelper elimination_helper(linear_system.rowEliminationHelper());
91  NodeInfoListView nodes_infos(node_group.itemFamily());
92  auto node_dof(dofs_on_nodes.nodeDoFConnectivityView());
93 
94  auto command = Accelerator::makeCommand(queue);
95  auto in_out_elimination_info = Accelerator::viewInOut(command, elimination_helper.getEliminationInfo());
96  auto in_out_elimination_value = Accelerator::viewInOut(command, elimination_helper.getEliminationValue());
97  command << RUNCOMMAND_ENUMERATE(NodeLocalId, node_lid, node_group)
98  {
99  if (nodes_infos.isOwn(node_lid)) {
100  DoFLocalId dof_id = node_dof.dofId(node_lid, dof_index);
101  in_out_elimination_info[dof_id] = elimination_type;
102  in_out_elimination_value[dof_id] = value;
103  }
104  };
105 }
106 
107 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
108 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
115 void BoundaryConditions::
116 applyDirichletToLhsAndRhs(BC::IDirichletBoundaryCondition* bs,
117  const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes, DoFLinearSystem& linear_system,
118  IMesh* mesh, RunQueue* queue)
119 {
120  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(bs);
121 
122  FaceGroup face_group = bs->getSurface();
123  NodeGroup node_group = face_group.nodeGroup();
124 
125  const StringConstArrayView u_dirichlet_string = bs->getValue();
126 
127  for (Int32 dof_index = 0; dof_index < u_dirichlet_string.size(); ++dof_index) {
128  if (u_dirichlet_string[dof_index] != "NULL") {
129 
130  Real value = std::stod(u_dirichlet_string[dof_index].localstr());
131 
132  if (bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod() == "Penalty") {
133  Real penalty = bs->getPenalty();
134  BoundaryConditionsHelpers::applyDirichletToNodeGroupViaPenalty(dof_index, value, penalty, queue, mesh, linear_system, dofs_on_nodes, node_group);
135  }
136  else if (bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod() == "RowElimination") {
137  BoundaryConditionsHelpers::applyDirichletToNodeGroupViaRowOrRowColumnElimination(ELIMINATE_ROW, dof_index, value, queue, linear_system, dofs_on_nodes, node_group);
138  }
139  else if (bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod() == "RowColumnElimination") {
140  BoundaryConditionsHelpers::applyDirichletToNodeGroupViaRowOrRowColumnElimination(ELIMINATE_ROW_COLUMN, dof_index, value, queue, linear_system, dofs_on_nodes, node_group);
141  }
142  else {
143  ARCANE_FATAL("Unknown method to enforce Dirichlet BC: '{0}'", bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod());
144  }
145  }
146  }
147 }
148 
149 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
150 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
157 void BoundaryConditions::
158 applyPointDirichletToLhsAndRhs(BC::IDirichletPointCondition* bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
159  DoFLinearSystem& linear_system, IMesh* mesh, RunQueue* queue)
160 {
161  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(bs);
162  NodeGroup node_group = bs->getNode();
163 
164  const StringConstArrayView u_dirichlet_str = bs->getValue();
165 
166  for (Int32 dof_index = 0; dof_index < u_dirichlet_str.size(); ++dof_index) {
167  if (u_dirichlet_str[dof_index] != "NULL") {
168  Real value = std::stod(u_dirichlet_str[dof_index].localstr());
169 
170  if (bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod() == "Penalty") {
171  Real penalty = bs->getPenalty();
172  BoundaryConditionsHelpers::applyDirichletToNodeGroupViaPenalty(dof_index, value, penalty, queue, mesh, linear_system, dofs_on_nodes, node_group);
173  }
174  else if (bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod() == "RowElimination") {
175  BoundaryConditionsHelpers::applyDirichletToNodeGroupViaRowOrRowColumnElimination(ELIMINATE_ROW, dof_index, value, queue, linear_system, dofs_on_nodes, node_group);
176  }
177  else if (bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod() == "RowColumnElimination") {
178  BoundaryConditionsHelpers::applyDirichletToNodeGroupViaRowOrRowColumnElimination(ELIMINATE_ROW_COLUMN, dof_index, value, queue, linear_system, dofs_on_nodes, node_group);
179  }
180  else {
181  ARCANE_FATAL("Unknown method to enforce Dirichlet BC: '{0}'", bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod());
182  }
183  }
184  }
185 }
186 
187 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
188 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
194 void BoundaryConditions::
195 applyDirichletToRhs(BC::IDirichletBoundaryCondition* bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
196  DoFLinearSystem& linear_system, IMesh* mesh, RunQueue* queue)
197 {
198  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(bs);
199 
200  FaceGroup face_group = bs->getSurface();
201  NodeGroup node_group = face_group.nodeGroup();
202 
203  const StringConstArrayView u_dirichlet_string = bs->getValue();
204 
205  for (Int32 dof_index = 0; dof_index < u_dirichlet_string.size(); ++dof_index) {
206  if (u_dirichlet_string[dof_index] != "NULL") {
207 
208  Real value = std::stod(u_dirichlet_string[dof_index].localstr());
209 
210  if (bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod() == "Penalty") {
211  Real penalty = bs->getPenalty();
212  value = value * penalty;
213  BoundaryConditionsHelpers::applyDirichletToNodeGroupRhsOnly(dof_index, value, queue, mesh, linear_system, dofs_on_nodes, node_group);
214  }
215  else if (bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod() == "RowElimination") {
216  BoundaryConditionsHelpers::applyDirichletToNodeGroupRhsOnly(dof_index, value, queue, mesh, linear_system, dofs_on_nodes, node_group);
217  }
218  else if (bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod() == "RowColumnElimination") {
219  ARCANE_THROW(Arccore::NotImplementedException, "RowColumnElimination is not supported.");
220  }
221  else {
222  ARCANE_FATAL("Unknown method to enforce Dirichlet BC: '{0}'", bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod());
223  }
224  }
225  }
226 }
227 
228 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
229 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
235 void BoundaryConditions::
236 applyPointDirichletToRhs(BC::IDirichletPointCondition* bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
237  DoFLinearSystem& linear_system, IMesh* mesh, RunQueue* queue)
238 {
239  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(bs);
240  NodeGroup node_group = bs->getNode();
241 
242  const StringConstArrayView u_dirichlet_str = bs->getValue();
243 
244  for (Int32 dof_index = 0; dof_index < u_dirichlet_str.size(); ++dof_index) {
245  if (u_dirichlet_str[dof_index] != "NULL") {
246  Real value = std::stod(u_dirichlet_str[dof_index].localstr());
247 
248  if (bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod() == "Penalty") {
249  Real penalty = bs->getPenalty();
250  value = value * penalty;
251  BoundaryConditionsHelpers::applyDirichletToNodeGroupRhsOnly(dof_index, value, queue, mesh, linear_system, dofs_on_nodes, node_group);
252  }
253  else if (bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod() == "RowElimination") {
254  BoundaryConditionsHelpers::applyDirichletToNodeGroupRhsOnly(dof_index, value, queue, mesh, linear_system, dofs_on_nodes, node_group);
255  }
256  else if (bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod() == "RowColumnElimination") {
257  ARCANE_THROW(Arccore::NotImplementedException, "RowColumnElimination is not supported.");
258  }
259  else {
260  ARCANE_FATAL("Unknown method to enforce Dirichlet BC: '{0}'", bs->getEnforceDirichletMethod());
261  }
262  }
263  }
264 }
265 
266 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
267 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
276 void BoundaryConditions2D::
277 applyConstantSourceToRhs(Real qdot, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
278  const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord,
279  VariableDoFReal& rhs_variable_na,
280  IMesh* mesh, RunQueue* queue)
281 {
282  auto func = [] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE(CellLocalId cell_lid,
283  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
284  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord) {
285  return MeshOperation::computeAreaTria3(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
286  };
287  BoundaryConditionsHelpers::applyConstantSourceToRhsBase(func, qdot, queue, rhs_variable_na, mesh, dofs_on_nodes, node_coord);
288 }
289 
290 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
291 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
299 void BoundaryConditions2D::
300 applyNeumannToRhs(BC::INeumannBoundaryCondition* bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
301  const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord, VariableDoFReal& rhs_variable_na,
302  IMesh* mesh, RunQueue* queue)
303 {
304  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(bs);
305  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(queue);
306  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(mesh);
307 
308  FaceGroup group = bs->getSurface();
309  bool scalarNeumann = false;
310  const StringConstArrayView neumann_str = bs->getValue();
311 
312  if (neumann_str.size() == 1 && neumann_str[0] != "NULL") {
313  scalarNeumann = true;
314  }
315 
316  UnstructuredMeshConnectivityView connectivity_view;
317  connectivity_view.setMesh(mesh);
318  NodeInfoListView nodes_infos(mesh->nodeFamily());
319  auto node_dof(dofs_on_nodes.nodeDoFConnectivityView());
320  auto fn_cv = connectivity_view.faceNode();
321 
322  if (scalarNeumann) {
323  Real value = std::stod(neumann_str[0].localstr());
324 
325  auto command = Accelerator::makeCommand(queue);
326  auto in_out_rhs_variable_na = Accelerator::viewInOut(command, rhs_variable_na);
327  auto in_node_coord = Accelerator::viewIn(command, node_coord);
328  command << RUNCOMMAND_ENUMERATE(FaceLocalId, face_lid, group)
329  {
330  Real length = MeshOperation::computeLengthFace(face_lid, fn_cv, in_node_coord);
331  for (NodeLocalId node_lid : fn_cv.nodes(face_lid)) {
332  if (nodes_infos.isOwn(node_lid)) {
333  Real rhs_value = value * length / 2.0;
334  Accelerator::doAtomic<Accelerator::eAtomicOperation::Add>(in_out_rhs_variable_na[node_dof.dofId(node_lid, 0)], rhs_value);
335  }
336  }
337  };
338  }
339  else {
340  Real value_x = neumann_str[0] != "NULL" ? std::stod(neumann_str[0].localstr()) : 0.0;
341  Real value_y = neumann_str[1] != "NULL" ? std::stod(neumann_str[1].localstr()) : 0.0;
342 
343  auto command = Accelerator::makeCommand(queue);
344  auto in_out_rhs_variable_na = Accelerator::viewInOut(command, rhs_variable_na);
345  auto in_node_coord = Accelerator::viewIn(command, node_coord);
346  FaceInfoListView faces_infos(mesh->faceFamily());
347  command << RUNCOMMAND_ENUMERATE(FaceLocalId, face_lid, group)
348  {
349  Real length = MeshOperation::computeLengthFace(face_lid, fn_cv, in_node_coord);
350  Real2 normal = MeshOperation::computeNormalFace(face_lid, fn_cv, in_node_coord, faces_infos);
351  for (NodeLocalId node_lid : fn_cv.nodes(face_lid)) {
352  if (nodes_infos.isOwn(node_lid)) {
353  Real rhs_value = (normal.x * value_x + normal.y * value_y) * length / 2.0;
354  Accelerator::doAtomic<Accelerator::eAtomicOperation::Add>(in_out_rhs_variable_na[node_dof.dofId(node_lid, 0)], rhs_value);
355  }
356  }
357  };
358  }
359 }
360 
361 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
362 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
371 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
372 
373 void BoundaryConditions3D::
374 applyConstantSourceToRhs(Real qdot, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes, const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord,
375  VariableDoFReal& rhs_variable_na, IMesh* mesh, RunQueue* queue)
376 {
377  auto func = [] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE(CellLocalId cell_lid,
378  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
379  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord) {
380  return MeshOperation::computeVolumeTetra4(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
381  };
382  BoundaryConditionsHelpers::applyConstantSourceToRhsBase(func, qdot, queue, rhs_variable_na, mesh, dofs_on_nodes, node_coord);
383 }
384 
385 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
386 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
395 void BoundaryConditions3D::
396 applyNeumannToRhs(BC::INeumannBoundaryCondition* bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
397  const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord, VariableDoFReal& rhs_variable_na,
398  IMesh* mesh, RunQueue* queue)
399 {
400  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(bs);
401  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(queue);
402  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(mesh);
403 
404  FaceGroup group = bs->getSurface();
405 
406  bool scalarNeumann = false;
407  const StringConstArrayView neumann_str = bs->getValue();
408 
409  if (neumann_str.size() == 1 && neumann_str[0] != "NULL") {
410  scalarNeumann = true;
411  }
412 
413  UnstructuredMeshConnectivityView connectivity_view;
414  connectivity_view.setMesh(mesh);
415  NodeInfoListView nodes_infos(mesh->nodeFamily());
416  auto node_dof(dofs_on_nodes.nodeDoFConnectivityView());
417  auto fn_cv = connectivity_view.faceNode();
418 
419  if (scalarNeumann) {
420  Real value = std::stod(neumann_str[0].localstr());
421 
422  auto command = Accelerator::makeCommand(queue);
423  auto in_out_rhs_variable_na = Accelerator::viewInOut(command, rhs_variable_na);
424  auto in_node_coord = Accelerator::viewIn(command, node_coord);
425  command << RUNCOMMAND_ENUMERATE(FaceLocalId, face_lid, group)
426  {
427  Real area = MeshOperation::computeAreaTria(face_lid, fn_cv, in_node_coord);
428  for (NodeLocalId node_lid : fn_cv.nodes(face_lid)) {
429  if (nodes_infos.isOwn(node_lid)) {
430  Real rhs_value = value * area / 3.0;
431  Accelerator::doAtomic<Accelerator::eAtomicOperation::Add>(in_out_rhs_variable_na[node_dof.dofId(node_lid, 0)], rhs_value);
432  }
433  }
434  };
435  }
436  else {
437  Real value_x = neumann_str[0] != "NULL" ? std::stod(neumann_str[0].localstr()) : 0.0;
438  Real value_y = neumann_str[1] != "NULL" ? std::stod(neumann_str[1].localstr()) : 0.0;
439  Real value_z = neumann_str[2] != "NULL" ? std::stod(neumann_str[2].localstr()) : 0.0;
440 
441  auto command = Accelerator::makeCommand(queue);
442  auto in_out_rhs_variable_na = Accelerator::viewInOut(command, rhs_variable_na);
443  auto in_node_coord = Accelerator::viewIn(command, node_coord);
444  FaceInfoListView faces_infos(mesh->faceFamily());
445  command << RUNCOMMAND_ENUMERATE(FaceLocalId, face_lid, group)
446  {
447  Real area = MeshOperation::computeAreaTria(face_lid, fn_cv, in_node_coord);
448  Real3 normal = MeshOperation::computeNormalTriangle(face_lid, fn_cv, in_node_coord, faces_infos);
449  for (NodeLocalId node_lid : fn_cv.nodes(face_lid)) {
450  if (nodes_infos.isOwn(node_lid)) {
451  Real rhs_value = (normal.x * value_x + normal.y * value_y + normal.z * value_z) * area / 3.0;
452  Accelerator::doAtomic<Accelerator::eAtomicOperation::Add>(in_out_rhs_variable_na[node_dof.dofId(node_lid, 0)], rhs_value);
453  }
454  }
455  };
456  }
457 }
458

464 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
465 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
Arcane::FemUtils::DoFLinearSystem
Linear system Matrix A + Vector x + Vector b for Ax=b.
Definition: DoFLinearSystem.h:155
Arcane::FemUtils::FemDoFsOnNodes
Manage one or more DoFs on Nodes.
Definition: FemDoFsOnNodes.h:46
Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::BoundaryConditions2D::applyNeumannToRhs
static void applyNeumannToRhs(BC::INeumannBoundaryCondition *bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes &dofs_on_nodes, const VariableNodeReal3 &node_coord, VariableDoFReal &rhs_variable_na, IMesh *mesh, Accelerator::RunQueue *queue)
Applies Neumann conditions to the right-hand side (RHS) values.
Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::BoundaryConditions2D::applyConstantSourceToRhs
static void applyConstantSourceToRhs(Real qdot, const FemDoFsOnNodes &dofs_on_nodes, const VariableNodeReal3 &node_coord, VariableDoFReal &rhs_variable_na, IMesh *mesh, Accelerator::RunQueue *queue)
Applies a constant source term to the RHS vector.
Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::BoundaryConditions3D::applyNeumannToRhs
static void applyNeumannToRhs(BC::INeumannBoundaryCondition *bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes &dofs_on_nodes, const VariableNodeReal3 &node_coord, VariableDoFReal &rhs_variable_na, IMesh *mesh, Accelerator::RunQueue *queue)
Applies Neumann conditions to the right-hand side (RHS) values.
Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::BoundaryConditions3D::applyConstantSourceToRhs
static void applyConstantSourceToRhs(Real qdot, const FemDoFsOnNodes &dofs_on_nodes, const VariableNodeReal3 &node_coord, VariableDoFReal &rhs_variable_na, IMesh *mesh, Accelerator::RunQueue *queue)
Applies a constant source term to the RHS vector.
Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::BoundaryConditions::applyPointDirichletToRhs
static void applyPointDirichletToRhs(BC::IDirichletPointCondition *bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes &dofs_on_nodes, DoFLinearSystem &linear_system, IMesh *mesh, Accelerator::RunQueue *queue)
Applies Point Dirichlet boundary conditions to RHS.
Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::BoundaryConditions::applyDirichletToRhs
static void applyDirichletToRhs(BC::IDirichletBoundaryCondition *bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes &dofs_on_nodes, DoFLinearSystem &linear_system, IMesh *mesh, Accelerator::RunQueue *queue)
Applies Dirichlet boundary conditions to RHS.
Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::BoundaryConditions::applyPointDirichletToLhsAndRhs
static void applyPointDirichletToLhsAndRhs(BC::IDirichletPointCondition *bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes &dofs_on_nodes, DoFLinearSystem &linear_system, IMesh *mesh, RunQueue *queue)
Applies Point Dirichlet boundary conditions to RHS and LHS.

Applies Dirichlet boundary conditions to RHS and LHS.
